case_title: GAYNOR DAVID VS JMB PROPERTIES CO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY GAYNOR DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT JMB PROPERTIES CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAYNOR DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JMB PROPERTIES CO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,508.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
